appraisal_events.evidence: Mme Verdurin fait « des avances » à Odette, déclare que « les portes lui sont ouvertes », mais ces paroles « furent redites, mais sans succès. Mme Verdurin attendit Odette sans la voir venir. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator underlines that Mme Verdurin lowers herself to solicit Odette and fails to make her return, which locally undermines her pride and her power of attraction.

status_effects.explanation: Her public and unsuccessful attempt to rally Odette weakens her locally by showing her limits of influence.
